name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[i] = 1
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 1
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
        \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = 1
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 1
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..1]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>
====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
         /\ count' = count + 1
         /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
      /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
         /\ tail' = tail
         /\ count' = count - 1
         /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Nat : r \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : r \notin readers'
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
             /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in readers : r \notin readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : r \notin readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Values

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenVal, Acceptor, Proposer, a
HighestAcceptedValue(a) == 
  IF accepts[a] = <<>> THEN <<>> ELSE accepts[a][2] ENDIF

HighestAcceptedBallot(a) == 
  IF accepts[a] = <<>> THEN <<>> ELSE accepts[a][1] ENDIF

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ acceptors = Acceptors
  /\ proposers = Proposers
  /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
  /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> 0]
  /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> <<>>]
  /\ chosen = [a \in acceptors |-> <<>>]
  /\ chosenVal = <<>>

(* Proposer's Prepare phase *)
Prepare(p) == 
  /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ chosenVal' = chosenVal

(* Acceptor's Promise phase *)
Promise(a, p) == 
  /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = ballots[p]]
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ chosenVal' = chosenVal

(* Proposer's Accept phase *)
Accept(p, v) == 
  /\ ballots' = ballots
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = <<ballots[p], v>>]
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ chosenVal' = chosenVal

(* Acceptor's Chosen phase *)
Chosen(a, v) == 
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepts' = accepts
  /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![a] = v]
  /\ chosenVal' = v

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E p \in proposers : Prepare(p)
  \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E p \in proposers :
        /\ promises[a] < ballots[p]
        /\ Promise(a, p)
  \/ \E p \in proposers : \E v \in Values :
        /\ \A a \in acceptors : promises[a] <= ballots[p]
        /\ Accept(p, v)
  \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E v \in Values :
        /\ \A a' \in acceptors : accepts[a'][1] <= accepts[a][1]
        /\ Chosen(a, v)

(* Invariant: chosenVal is consistent with chosen mapping *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \subseteq Acceptors
  /\ proposers \subseteq Proposers
  /\ ballots \in [proposers -> Nat]
  /\ promises \in [acceptors -> Nat]
  /\ accepts \in [acceptors -> <<>> \/ <<Nat, Value>>]
  /\ chosen \in [acceptors -> <<>> \/ Value]
  /\ chosenVal \in <<>> \/ Value
  /\ \A a \in acceptors : 
        IF chosen[a] = <<>> THEN TRUE ELSE 
          /\ chosenVal = chosen[a]
          /\ \A a' \in acceptors : accepts[a'][1] <= accepts[a][1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenVal>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ chunk <= Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ /\ chunk <= Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ chunk > Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, chunk)
       /\ chunk' = 1
    \/ /\ chunk > Len(file)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ chunk' = chunk

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ p \in free
        /\ c \in Client
        /\ p \in Pages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
